name: the gate rejects a rule withheld without the complete conjunction justification
command:
mkdir -p owasp
printf 'source:
  id: x
rules:
  - id: g-bad
    enforcement:
      mode: withheld
      reason: x
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > owasp/bad.yaml
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-universality-coverage.sh --root .
